education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

bullets: Designed an efficient pipeline that converts raw fab data into actionable utility trade ratios, reducing report generation time and manual intervention.
Utilized GCP services (Cloud Functions, BigQuery, Pub/Sub, Workflows) and FastAPI to deliver real-time insights, ensuring rapid and reliable data access for manufacturing decisions.
Implemented automated data validation and error-handling measures, enhancing data integrity and reducing downstream processing delays.
Optimized SQL stored procedures and scheduling processes to significantly reduce report generation times and manual intervention.
Engineered an end-to-end automated pipeline to validate process codes and verify product availability, replacing time-consuming manual processes.
Leveraged Snowflake and GCP Scheduler to streamline data processing, significantly shortening the turnaround time for inventory checks and order validations.
Automated manual DDL rewriting and ETL migration from MSSQL, Oracle, and SAP HANA to Snowflake, drastically reducing manual effort and errors.
Developed robust Python scripts with comprehensive logging and error-handling, standardizing data workflows and improving overall deployment speed.
Automated synchronization of DDL changes across development, test, and production environments, significantly minimizing downtime and ensuring consistent deployment.
Integrated parallel processing with Ray to accelerate large-scale ETL operations, dramatically cutting overall processing times.
Deployed generative AI workflows using LLMs and RAG-based systems to automate routine tasks, further enhancing pipeline efficiency.

skills: Google Cloud Platform (BigQuery, Cloud Functions, Pub/Sub, Secret Manager, Scheduler, Workflows)

summary: Results-driven Data Engineer with close to 2 years of experience at Micron Technology, specializing in automating ETL processes, migrating multi-source datasets to Snowflake, and building scalable data pipelines using Python, SQL, and GCP services. Demonstrated expertise in streamlining operations through innovative solutions, including parallel processing for large datasets and reusable pipelines, while addressing diverse data scenarios. Proven ability to design seamless workflows, leveraging advanced programming techniques and strong problem-solving skills. Adept at integrating cutting-edge technologies, including generative AI tools and large language models, to automate workflows and enhance productivity.
